grid.name: baseline_phase7_5_recommended
grid.description: Phase 7.5 production-recommended: candidate_k=40, MMR λ=0.70. No section-aware rerank. New baseline for Phase 7.6.

grid.name: section_bonus_005
grid.description: Add a +0.05 bonus to candidates whose section_path matches the gold expected_section_path (prefix or substring). DIAGNOSTIC ONLY — needs oracle access, not production-deployable.

grid.name: section_bonus_010
grid.description: Add a +0.10 bonus to candidates whose section_path matches the gold expected_section_path (prefix or substring). DIAGNOSTIC ONLY — needs oracle access, not production-deployable.

grid.name: section_bonus_015
grid.description: Add a +0.15 bonus to candidates whose section_path matches the gold expected_section_path (prefix or substring). DIAGNOSTIC ONLY — needs oracle access, not production-deployable.

grid.name: supporting_chunk_proximity
grid.description: Boost candidates that share the gold row's human_supporting_chunk_id page AND a small section-path edit distance. DIAGNOSTIC ONLY — needs oracle supporting-chunk annotation.

grid.name: page_first_section_rerank_overlap
grid.description: Two-pass rerank: page-level diversification then section-name token overlap with the query inside each retained page. PRODUCTION-DEPLOYABLE.

grid.name: same_page_chunk_rerank
grid.description: Within each page in the Phase 7.5 top-k, swap the represented chunk for the page's best section-name overlap chunk. PRODUCTION-DEPLOYABLE.
